channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping on the top floor at Fontenelle, 14th July
item.description:
Fly tipping and dumped rubbish has been left near the bin chutes on the top floor at Fontenelle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 14th July
item.description:
When it rains, this drain is always blocke causing pedestrians to walk around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12a, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bath & shower screen flytipped, 14th July
item.description:
Bath and shower screen propped uo againt tree. May fall onto a pedestrian

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence damage on Public Footpath 78, 14th July
item.description:
The wooden fence belong to no. 60 Groombridge Close has fallen sideways and is pressing against the metal fence which runs alongside the footpath causing it to lean into the footpath. The owner of no. 60 needs to straighten up his wooden fence so that the metal fencing can be sorted out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole has appeared, 14th July
item.description:
Hole has appeared in the road and the ground seems indented. Concerned there seems to be a cavity underneath the hole and could enlarge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th July
item.description:
More fly tipping in N16

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge (appeared in day on 14 July) blocking side of road. Dangerous for oncoming vehicles., 14th July
item.description:
Fridge flytipped in road. Appeared during day on 14 July 2026. In road and dangerous for oncoming traffic and buses.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage and cracking on the tactile surface, 14th July
item.description:
The tactile paving at the traffic lights where Westwood Lane and Hook Lane intersect is cracked and uneven. This could cause someone with mobility issues or vision problems to have an accident. There has been an attempt to fill one part with tarmac but this is not an acceptable repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of lots of building rubbing next to the flats, 14th July
item.description:
Fly tipping
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73-91, Naylor Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bin bags, 14th July
item.description:
Bin bags dumped next to railings - there for over a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th July
item.description:
Fly tipping has not been dealt with by the council for a long time so people are bringing rubbish from other areas and dumping it. Fly tipping centre. There are vermin. Health hazard for children. Encroaching on the road and blocking entrances.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxley Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of wipes dumped on grassy area, 14th July
item.description:
A bag of wipes dumped on grassy area. Missed in weekly clear-up - these are there for going on two weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delisle Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in the parking area, 14th July
item.description:
There is a big pile of bags, clothes, furniture in the parking area( on Goldfinch Road )and behind people's houses.The piles are growing every day and we cannot continue to live in this rubbish. We have young children and our health is in danger. Can somebody please come and collect the rubbish and put some signs to stop or discourage behaviours like this? Regards, Mirela C.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin has been removed from the street by bus stop on Sidcup Hill, 14th July
item.description:
The waste bin has been removed, there is now no bin and people are leaving dog waste/rubbish on the street. There are no bins close by so will you be reinstalling a new bin?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup Hill, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter pile dumped and been growing for over a week, 14th July
item.description:
Overflowing bin store litter down street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Queen's Row, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags dumped here again, 14th July
item.description:
Multiple black bins left by commercial bins and been opened.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Mission Place, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop saying it’s fixed when it’s not, 14th July
item.description:
I’ll keep reporting this issue. It’s getting worse as more cans are chucked by the local alcoholics. Get with the program please. I voted for you as the promise was to clean up the borough but you are not different from Labour - they also ignored my reports…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in park on path and on archway of old priority, 14th July
item.description:
Profane graffiti on path of upper terrace by stairs and on archway directly opposite.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Priory Avenue, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at junction of Hill View Drive and Shepherds Lane, 14th July
item.description:
See summary

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hill View Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van parked in cycle lane on Hoe Street near Central Wine, 14th July
item.description:
Green DPD electric Ford Transit van, registration EK72 TXG, parked fully across the mandatory cycle lane (double yellow lines) on Hoe Street, outside the parade of shops including Central Wine, Cronera Coffee and M&S Carpets & Furniture, observed today (14 July 2026). Cyclists are forced out into the traffic lane to get past it. Photo attached. Vehicles parking in the cycle lane here is a recurring problem

Report on FixMyStreet
